---
title: "Water Source Survey Analysis"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y %H:%M')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: true
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 2
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, cache = FALSE)
library(knitr)
library(scales)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggspatial)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(lemon)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
library(magick)

source("ws_cleanup.R")
```

```{r case_counts}
# Calculate counts and complete cases for each community
month_order <- c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep")

# Function to calculate complete cases
calculate_complete <- function(data, current_month) {
  months_up_to <- month_order[1:which(month_order == current_month)]
  
  data %>%
    filter(!is.na(wsid), display_month %in% months_up_to) %>%
    group_by(wsid) %>%
    summarise(n_months = n_distinct(display_month), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(n_months == length(months_up_to)) %>%
    nrow()
}

# Calculate for each community in specified order
communities <- c("Cockle Bay", "Dworzark", "Portee Rokupa")
results <- map_df(communities, function(comm) {
  comm_data <- ws_data %>% filter(community == comm)
  
  # Get unique wsids for this community
  comm_wsids <- comm_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(wsid)) %>%
    distinct(wsid) %>%
    nrow()
  
  counts <- comm_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(display_month)) %>%
    distinct(wsid, display_month) %>%
    count(display_month, .drop = FALSE) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = display_month, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)
  
  complete_cases <- tibble(
    display_month = month_order
  ) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(complete = calculate_complete(comm_data, display_month)) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = display_month, values_from = complete, values_fill = 0)
  
  # Combine counts and complete cases with line break
  combined <- counts
  for (month in month_order) {
    if (month %in% names(counts) && month %in% names(complete_cases)) {
      count_val <- counts[[month]]
      complete_val <- complete_cases[[month]]
      combined[[month]] <- if_else(count_val == 0, 
                                    "", 
                                    paste0(count_val, "<br>(", complete_val, "/", comm_wsids, ")"))
    }
  }
  
  combined %>%
    mutate(community = comm,
           Total = comm_data %>% distinct(wsid) %>% nrow())
})

# Add totals row
# Get total unique wsids across all communities
total_wsids <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(wsid)) %>%
  distinct(wsid) %>%
  nrow()

totals_counts <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month)) %>%
  distinct(wsid, display_month) %>%
  count(display_month, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = display_month, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

totals_complete <- tibble(
  display_month = month_order
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(complete = calculate_complete(ws_data, display_month)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = display_month, values_from = complete, values_fill = 0)

# Combine totals counts and complete cases with line break
totals <- totals_counts
for (month in month_order) {
  if (month %in% names(totals_counts) && month %in% names(totals_complete)) {
    count_val <- totals_counts[[month]]
    complete_val <- totals_complete[[month]]
    totals[[month]] <- if_else(count_val == 0, 
                                "", 
                                paste0(count_val, "<br>(", complete_val, "/", total_wsids, ")"))
  }
}

totals <- totals %>%
  mutate(community = "Total",
         Total = total_wsids)

# Combine and format
final_table <- results %>%
  bind_rows(totals) %>%
  rename(Community = community) %>%
  select(Community, all_of(month_order), Total) %>%
  kable(align = c('l', rep('c', length(month_order) + 1)), format = "html", escape = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover")) %>%
  row_spec(nrow(results) + 1, bold = TRUE) %>%
  footnote(general_title = "Values show total water sources surveyed that month. Numbers in parentheses show water sources surveyed in all months from November through that month (complete cases / total unique water sources in community).", general = "")

final_table
```

## Mapping Source Type

```{r pr_cb_map, message = F, warning = F, fig.width = 16, fig.height = 12, out.width = "100%"}
# Function to create community map
create_community_map <- function(community_name, shapefile, ws_data, source_colors) {
  # Filter and convert to sf
  sources <- ws_data %>%
    filter(community == community_name, !is.na(gps_location), !is.na(wsid)) %>%
    distinct(wsid, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    separate(gps_location, into = c("latitude", "longitude", "altitude", "accuracy"), 
             sep = " ", remove = FALSE, convert = TRUE) %>%
    filter(!is.na(latitude), !is.na(longitude)) %>%
    st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
  
  # Create labels with counts for this community
  counts <- sources %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    count(water_source_type) %>%
    mutate(label = paste0(water_source_type, " (n=", n, ")"))
  
  all_types <- names(source_colors)
  labels <- setNames(
    ifelse(all_types %in% counts$water_source_type,
           counts$label[match(all_types, counts$water_source_type)],
           paste0(all_types, " (n=0)")),
    all_types
  )
  
  # Create map
  ggplot() +
    annotation_map_tile(type = "osm", zoomin = 0, progress = "none") +
    geom_sf(data = shapefile, fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 1.5) +
    geom_sf(data = sources, aes(fill = water_source_type), 
            size = 5, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 1.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = source_colors, labels = labels, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(title = community_name) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          axis.title = element_blank(),
          legend.position = "top",
          legend.title = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20),
          legend.text = element_text(size = 14))
}
# Read the shapefiles
cockle_shapefile <- st_read("shapefiles/CockleBay.shp", quiet = TRUE)
portee_shapefile <- st_read("shapefiles/PorteeRokupa.shp", quiet = TRUE)
dworzark_shapefile <- st_read("shapefiles/Dworzark.shp", quiet = TRUE)
# Define colors
source_colors <- c(
  "Open Well" = "#D2B48C",
  "Closed Well" = "#5C4033",
  "Private Tap" = "#FFB6C1",
  "Public Tap" = "#DC143C",
  "Surface Water" = "#87CEEB",
  "Spring" = "#4682B4",
  "Tank" = "#FFFFFF"
)
# Create maps
p_cockle <- create_community_map("Cockle Bay", cockle_shapefile, ws_data, source_colors)
p_portee <- create_community_map("Portee Rokupa", portee_shapefile, ws_data, source_colors)
# Arrange maps side by side
grid.arrange(p_cockle, p_portee, ncol = 2)
```

```{r dworzark_map, fig.width = 16, fig.height = 12, out.width = "100%"}
# Dworzark map
create_community_map("Dworzark", dworzark_shapefile, ws_data, source_colors)
```

# Analysis

## Source Type
```{r source_type}
# Find the most recent month with >200 total sources
latest_month <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month)) %>%
  count(display_month) %>%
  mutate(display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  filter(n > 200) %>%
  filter(as.numeric(display_month) == max(as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  pull(display_month)

# Calculate water source percentages by community for that month
source_by_community <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(water_source_type), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  count(community, water_source_type) %>%
  group_by(community) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

# Add total
source_total <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(water_source_type), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  count(water_source_type) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         community = "Total")

source_by_community <- bind_rows(source_by_community, source_total) %>%
  mutate(community = factor(community, levels = c("Total", "Cockle Bay", "Dworzark", "Portee Rokupa")),
         community_label = paste0(community, " (n=", total, ")"))

source_by_community <- source_by_community %>%
  mutate(community_label = reorder(community_label, as.numeric(community)))

# Shared theme
shared_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 8))

# Total plot
p_total <- source_by_community %>%
  filter(community == "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = water_source_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ws_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Community plot
p_community <- source_by_community %>%
  filter(community != "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = water_source_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ws_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8))

# Combine with Total taking half the chart
combined <- p_total + p_community + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1), guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = paste0("Water Source Types (", latest_month, ")"),
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
                                legend.position = "top"))

combined & theme(legend.position = "top")
```

## Manager Gender

```{r manager_gender}
# Find the most recent month with >200 total sources
latest_month <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month)) %>%
  count(display_month) %>%
  mutate(display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  filter(n > 200) %>%
  filter(as.numeric(display_month) == max(as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  pull(display_month)

# Calculate manager gender percentages by community for that month
manager_by_community <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(manager_gender), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(manager_gender = factor(manager_gender, levels = c("Male", "Female", "Mixed"))) %>%
  count(community, manager_gender, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(community) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

manager_total <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(manager_gender), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(manager_gender = factor(manager_gender, levels = c("Male", "Female", "Mixed"))) %>%
  count(manager_gender, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         community = "Total")

manager_by_community <- bind_rows(manager_by_community, manager_total) %>%
  mutate(community = factor(community, levels = c("Total", "Cockle Bay", "Dworzark", "Portee Rokupa")),
         community_label = paste0(community, " (n=", total, ")"))

manager_by_community <- manager_by_community %>%
  mutate(community_label = reorder(community_label, as.numeric(community)))

# Define manager gender colors
manager_colors <- c(
  "Male" = "lightblue",
  "Female" = "lightcoral",
  "Mixed" = "plum"
)

# Shared theme
shared_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 8))

# Total plot
p_total <- manager_by_community %>%
  filter(community == "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = manager_gender)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = manager_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Community plot
p_community <- manager_by_community %>%
  filter(community != "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = manager_gender)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = manager_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8))

# Combine with Total taking half the chart
combined <- p_total + p_community + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1), guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = paste0("Water Source Manager Gender (", latest_month, ")"),
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
                                legend.position = "top"))

combined & theme(legend.position = "top")
```

## Owner Type

```{r owner_type}
# Calculate owner type percentages by community for latest month
owner_by_community <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(owner_type), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(owner_type = factor(owner_type, levels = c("Individual", "Household", "Committee", "Organization"))) %>%
  count(community, owner_type, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(community) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

# Add total
owner_total <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(owner_type), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(owner_type = factor(owner_type, levels = c("Individual", "Household", "Committee", "Organization"))) %>%
  count(owner_type, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         community = "Total")

owner_by_community <- bind_rows(owner_by_community, owner_total) %>%
  mutate(community = factor(community, levels = c("Total", "Cockle Bay", "Dworzark", "Portee Rokupa")),
         community_label = paste0(community, " (n=", total, ")"))

owner_by_community <- owner_by_community %>%
  mutate(community_label = reorder(community_label, as.numeric(community)))

# Define owner type colors
owner_colors <- c(
  "Individual" = "goldenrod",
  "Household" = "sienna",
  "Committee" = "seagreen",
  "Organization" = "steelblue"
)

# Shared theme
shared_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 8))

# Total plot
p_total <- owner_by_community %>%
  filter(community == "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = owner_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = owner_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Community plot
p_community <- owner_by_community %>%
  filter(community != "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = owner_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = owner_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8))

# Combine with Total taking half the chart
combined <- p_total + p_community + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1), guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = paste0("Water Source Owner Type (", latest_month, ")"),
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
                                legend.position = "top"))

combined & theme(legend.position = "top")
```

## Source Age

```{r source_age}
# Calculate source age percentages by community for latest month
age_by_community <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(source_age), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(source_age = factor(source_age, levels = c("Less than 6 Months", "6 months to one year", "1 to 5 years", "5 to 10", "10 to 20", "20+ years"))) %>%
  count(community, source_age, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(community) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

# Add total
age_total <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(source_age), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(source_age = factor(source_age, levels = c("Less than 6 Months", "6 months to one year", "1 to 5 years", "5 to 10", "10 to 20", "20+ years"))) %>%
  count(source_age, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         community = "Total")

age_by_community <- bind_rows(age_by_community, age_total) %>%
  mutate(community = factor(community, levels = c("Total", "Cockle Bay", "Dworzark", "Portee Rokupa")),
         community_label = paste0(community, " (n=", total, ")"))

age_by_community <- age_by_community %>%
  mutate(community_label = reorder(community_label, as.numeric(community)))

# Define source age colors with grouped gradients
age_colors <- c(
  "Less than 6 Months" = "#f5e6d3",
  "6 months to one year" = "#8b6914",
  "1 to 5 years" = "#c7e9c0",
  "5 to 10" = "#41ab5d",
  "10 to 20" = "#9ecae1",
  "20+ years" = "#08519c"
)

# Shared theme
shared_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 8))

# Total plot
p_total <- age_by_community %>%
  filter(community == "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = source_age)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Community plot
p_community <- age_by_community %>%
  filter(community != "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = source_age)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = age_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8))

# Combine with Total taking half the chart
combined <- p_total + p_community + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1), guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = paste0("Water Source Age (", latest_month, ")"),
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
                                legend.position = "top"))

combined & theme(legend.position = "top", legend.text = element_text(size = 7)) &
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2, title = NULL))
```

## Funder

```{r funder}
# Calculate funder type percentages by community for latest month
funder_by_community <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(funder), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(funder = factor(funder, levels = c("Household/self", "Community", "FCC", "National Government", "Freetown-based NGO", "International NGO"))) %>%
  count(community, funder, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(community) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

# Add total
funder_total <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(funder), display_month == latest_month) %>%
  mutate(funder = factor(funder, levels = c("Household/self", "Community", "FCC", "National Government", "Freetown-based NGO", "International NGO"))) %>%
  count(funder, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         community = "Total")

funder_by_community <- bind_rows(funder_by_community, funder_total) %>%
  mutate(community = factor(community, levels = c("Total", "Cockle Bay", "Dworzark", "Portee Rokupa")),
         community_label = paste0(community, " (n=", total, ")"))

funder_by_community <- funder_by_community %>%
  mutate(community_label = reorder(community_label, as.numeric(community)))

# Define funder type colors
funder_colors <- c(
  "Household/self" = "goldenrod",
  "Community" = "sienna",
  "FCC" = "lightgreen",
  "National Government" = "darkgreen",
  "Freetown-based NGO" = "steelblue",
  "International NGO" = "navy"
)

# Shared theme
shared_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = .5, size = 8))

# Total plot
p_total <- funder_by_community %>%
  filter(community == "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = funder)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = funder_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Community plot
p_community <- funder_by_community %>%
  filter(community != "Total") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = community_label, y = pct, fill = funder)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_x_discrete(guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = funder_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  shared_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8))

# Combine with Total taking half the chart
combined <- p_total + p_community + 
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1), guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = paste0("Water Source Funder (", latest_month, ")"),
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
                                legend.position = "top"))

combined & theme(legend.position = "top", legend.text = element_text(size = 7)) &
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2, title = NULL))
```

## User Per Day

```{r users_per_day}
# Define users per day colors
users_colors <- c(
  "0" = "black",
  "1 to 10" = "grey70",
  "10 to 20" = "#d4a574",
  "20 to 50" = "#8b6914",
  "50 to 100" = "#c7e9c0",
  "100 to 200" = "#a1d99b",
  "200 to 300" = "#41ab5d",
  "300 to 500" = "#9ecae1",
  "500 to 1000" = "#4292c6",
  "1000+" = "#cb181d"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(users_per_day)) %>%
  mutate(display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, users_per_day, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = users_per_day)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = users_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Source Users Per Day") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
```

## Access Rights

```{r access_rights}
access_colors <- c(
  "Household" = "#8c510a",
  "Close friends and family" = "#d8b365",
  "Community" = "#5ab4ac",
  "Anybody" = "#01665e"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(access_rights)) %>%
  mutate(access_rights = factor(access_rights, levels = c("Household", "Close friends and family", "Community", "Anybody")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, access_rights, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = access_rights)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = access_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Source Access Rights") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
```

## Price Per Jerry Can

```{r price_per_jerrycan}
# Dynamically create colors based on unique values
unique_prices <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(price_per_jerrycan)) %>%
  pull(price_per_jerrycan) %>%
  unique() %>%
  sort()

assign_price_color <- function(prices) {
  colors <- sapply(prices, function(p) {
    if (p == 0) {
      "grey70"
    } else if (p <= 1) {
      low_prices <- prices[prices > 0 & prices <= 1]
      green_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("#c7e9c0", "#006d2c"))(length(low_prices))
      green_palette[which(low_prices == p)]
    } else {
      high_prices <- prices[prices > 1]
      red_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("#fcbba1", "#cb181d"))(length(high_prices))
      red_palette[which(high_prices == p)]
    }
  })
  names(colors) <- prices
  return(colors)
}

price_colors <- assign_price_color(unique_prices)
names(price_colors) <- as.character(unique_prices)
price_colors["0"] <- "grey70"

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(price_per_jerrycan)) %>%
  mutate(display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, price_per_jerrycan, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month)),
         price_per_jerrycan = factor(price_per_jerrycan, levels = unique_prices)) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = factor(price_per_jerrycan))) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = price_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "NLe Per Jerrycan",
       title = "Water Source Price Per Jerrycan") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
```

## Monthly Fee

```{r price_per_month}
price_month_colors <- c(
  "Yes" = "#41ab5d",
  "No" = "grey70"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month)) %>%
  mutate(has_monthly_price = factor(
    ifelse(!is.na(price_per_month) & price_per_month > 0, "Yes", "No"),
    levels = c("Yes", "No")),
    display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, has_monthly_price, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = has_monthly_price)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = price_month_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Sources with Monthly Price") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank())
```

## Price Change

```{r price_change}
price_change_colors <- c(
  "Yes" = "#cb181d",
  "No" = "#41ab5d"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(price_change)) %>%
  mutate(price_change = factor(price_change, levels = c("Yes", "No")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, price_change, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = price_change)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = price_change_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Source Price Change") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank())
```

## Days Per Week

```{r days_per_week}
days_colors <- c(
  "7 days per week" = "#08519c",
  "4-6 days per week" = "#6baed6",
  "2-3 days per week" = "#fdae61",
  "1 day per week" = "#f46d43",
  "Less than weekly" = "#d73027"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(days_per_week)) %>%
  mutate(days_per_week = factor(days_per_week, levels = c("7 days per week", "4-6 days per week", "2-3 days per week", "1 day per week", "Less than weekly")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, days_per_week, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = days_per_week)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = days_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Source Availability (Days Per Week)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
```

## Daily Schedule

```{r daily_schedule}
schedule_colors <- c(
  "All day" = "#08519c",
  "Twice a day" = "#6baed6",
  "Three times a day" = "#f46d43",
  "Randomly throughout day" = "#d73027"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(daily_schedule)) %>%
  mutate(daily_schedule = factor(daily_schedule, levels = c("All day", "Twice a day", "Three times a day", "Randomly throughout day")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, daily_schedule, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = daily_schedule)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = schedule_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Source Daily Schedule") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
```

## Opening time

```{r opening_time}
opening_colors <- c(
  "1am" = "#67000D",
  "2am" = "#A50F15",
  "3am" = "#CB181D",
  "4am" = "#EF3B2C",
  "5am" = "#FB6A4A",
  "6am" = "#C6DBEF",
  "7am" = "#9ECAE1",
  "8am" = "#6BAED6",
  "9am" = "#4292C6",
  "10am" = "#2171B5",
  "11am" = "#08519C",
  "Afternoon" = "grey80",
  "Evening" = "grey50"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(opening_time)) %>%
  mutate(opening_time = factor(opening_time, levels = c("1am", "2am", "3am", "4am", "5am", "6am", "7am", "8am", "9am", "10am", "11am", "Afternoon", "Evening")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, opening_time, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = opening_time)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = opening_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL, title = "Water Source Opening Time") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top") +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))
```

## Is Potable

```{r potable}
potable_colors <- c(
  "Yes" = "#08519c",
  "No" = "#cb181d",
  "Unknown" = "grey70"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(is_potable)) %>%
  mutate(is_potable = factor(is_potable, levels = c("Yes", "No", "Unknown")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, is_potable, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = is_potable)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = potable_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Source Potability") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank())
```

## Treatment Frequency

```{r treatment_frequency}
treatment_colors <- c(
  "Daily" = "#08519c",
  "Weekly" = "#6baed6",
  "Monthly" = "#fdae61",
  "Less than Monthly" = "#f46d43",
  "Never" = "#d73027"
)

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month), !is.na(treatment_frequency)) %>%
  mutate(treatment_frequency = factor(treatment_frequency, levels = c("Daily", "Weekly", "Monthly", "Less than Monthly", "Never")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  count(display_month, treatment_frequency, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  mutate(total = sum(n),
         pct = n / total * 100,
         month_label = paste0(display_month, "\n(n=", total, ")")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(month_label = reorder(month_label, as.numeric(display_month))) %>%
  filter(n > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = pct, fill = treatment_frequency)) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5, reverse = TRUE), size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = treatment_colors) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Water Source Treatment Frequency") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))
```

## Percent Women Gatherers

```{r women_gatherers, fig.width=10, fig.height=12}
# Calculate average for Total by month
total_avg <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month) & !is.na(percent_women_gatherers)) %>%
  group_by(display_month) %>%
  summarise(avg_women = mean(percent_women_gatherers, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep")))

ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(percent_women_gatherers)) %>%
  select(display_month, community, percent_women_gatherers) %>%
  bind_rows(
    ws_data %>%
      filter(!is.na(community) & !is.na(display_month) & !is.na(percent_women_gatherers)) %>%
      mutate(community = "Total") %>%
      select(display_month, community, percent_women_gatherers)
  ) %>%
  mutate(community = factor(community, levels = c("Total", "Cockle Bay", "Dworzark", "Portee Rokupa")),
         display_month = factor(display_month, levels = c("Nov", "Jan", "Mar", "May", "Jul", "Sep"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = percent_women_gatherers, color = community, fill = community, alpha = community)) +
  geom_density(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(data = total_avg, aes(xintercept = avg_women), color = "red", linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Cockle Bay" = "forestgreen", "Dworzark" = "sandybrown", 
                                "Portee Rokupa" = "steelblue", "Total" = "black")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cockle Bay" = "forestgreen", "Dworzark" = "sandybrown", 
                               "Portee Rokupa" = "steelblue", "Total" = "black")) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("Cockle Bay" = 0.3, "Dworzark" = 0.3, 
                                "Portee Rokupa" = 0.3, "Total" = 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 100, 25)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100, 0), "%")) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 100)) +
  facet_rep_wrap(~display_month, ncol = 1, drop = FALSE, repeat.tick.labels = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Percent Women Gatherers", y = "Percentage of Water Sources", color = NULL, fill = NULL, alpha = NULL,
       title = "Distribution of Percent Women Gatherers by Month") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "top",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")) +
  guides(alpha = "none")
```

## Qualitative Response Counts
```{r qual_responses}
qual_vars <- c("responsibility", "free_or_pay", "difficulties", "relationships", 
               "community_influence", "fcc_influence", "community_help", "fcc_help", 
               "recent_issues", "danger_gatherers", "danger_providers", 
               "improvement_suggestions", "new_sources_impact", "introduce_sources", 
               "misunderstandings")

# Get total surveys per month
total_surveys_month <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month)) %>%
  count(display_month, name = "total_surveys")

# Calculate counts and percentages across all communities
qual_total <- ws_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_month)) %>%
  select(display_month, all_of(qual_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(qual_vars), names_to = "variable", values_to = "response") %>%
  filter(!is.na(response) & response != "") %>%
  count(variable, display_month) %>%
  left_join(total_surveys_month, by = "display_month") %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / total_surveys * 100, 1),
         count_pct = paste0(n, " (", pct, "%)")) %>%
  select(variable, display_month, count_pct) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = display_month, values_from = count_pct, values_fill = "0 (0%)") %>%
  rename(Variable = variable)

qual_total %>%
  kable() %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```
